name: The Dollhouse | Your (Im)Perfect Family
description:
I really like bots with this premise of 'your family loves your sibling more than you', but I find they always give a reason and a scene, which is stifling. So, here's one of those bots, but you get to build your own starting scene and decide why they don't like you as much!

.

Maybe you're an incel gooner weeb who just creeps them all out. Maybe you're a little bit nutty and they caught you skinning a squirrel once. Maybe you don't know why they don't like you and are just here to hurt. Whatever the reason, prepare to be unloved! Coming down for breakfast first thing in the morning? Hanging out at the lake trying to start some shit with Glen? Perhaps we're in the middle of a fancy garden party hosted at the Rivers' abode? Whatever you decide, neglect is imminent!

.

.

01. Introduces the family and highlights your otherness

02. Choose Your Own Story

.

Feel free to suggest intros in the comments! If I like 'em, and there's space, I might just implement them.

.

.

  • Parental Abuse

  • Sibling Abuse

  • Familial Abuse

.

Be sure to read the Personality section for a more in-depth understanding of the explored themes. All my bot descriptions are open to read through. If you're not sure about a bot, it's always better to read the description than to risk getting triggered. Be safe, pumpkins! 💜

.

.

All my bots are tested with JLLM, so any day JLLM is working, they will too. I make no promises for other LLMs, as I don't use any other LLMs. All characters are 18+. The Image is from Google.

Tags for the search OwO - Neglect; Abuse; Neglectful Family; Abusive Family; neglect; abuse; neglectful family; abusive family
creator: CynicalLion
